behavior_summary: This script implements event handlers for the Cardas NPC that act as thin adapters: they prepare event context and forward the actual behavior to shared system routines (SORCERER class handlers for dialog/proximity and SPELCMBT for spell resolution).
Handlers covered: U8P_CARDAS::look (examine), use (interact), enterFastArea (proximity enter), leaveFastArea (proximity leave), and cast (spell cast).

Each handler sets local info/process-exclude state, pushes the event context and caller pid (and the spell id for cast), spawns the appropriate external routine, consumes the returned value with an implies/pop pattern, then suspends/returns.
No global flags are read or written by these handlers; state changes and actual game effects are implemented in the called SORCERER / SPELCMBT routines.
notable_control_flow: All handlers follow the same control pattern: set per-object info/process-exclude, push context and pid (and other params as needed), spawn an external resolver routine, free temporary string resources (when used), handle the spawn return via an implies/pop sequence, then suspend and return.
CARDAS::look and CARDAS::use pass a literal string "Cardas" to the SORCERER routines and free that string after spawning.
CARDAS::cast forwards a spell id (uword) to the spell-combat resolver SPELCMBT::084D and returns its result via the implied return handling.
open_questions: What exact side-effects and dialog text the SORCERER::039C and SORCERER::05EC routines present for U8P_CARDAS::look/use — the cardas-specific content is implemented in those routines and not visible here.

Precise semantics and side-effects of the 'set info + process-exclude' sequence used by each handler (which info key is set and how the engine uses the exclusion) — inferred from pattern but not named here.
Meaning and consequences of the implies/pop handling of the spawned routine return value (how it affects calling process flow beyond suspending).

main_function.name: U8P_CARDAS::look
main_function.purpose: Handle the player's 'U8P_CARDAS::look' (examine) event on the Cardas NPC by forwarding to the shared SORCERER U8P_CARDAS::look/description routine with appropriate context and caller pid.
entry_conditions: Event 0: triggered when an actor (typically the player) looks at Cardas or inspects the NPC.

function_map.name: U8P_CARDAS::look
function_map.role: Forward 'U8P_CARDAS::look' event to SORCERER::039C after preparing context and process exclusion

function_map.name: U8P_CARDAS::use
function_map.role: Forward 'use' event to SORCERER::05EC with context and the literal 'Cardas'

function_map.name: U8P_CARDAS::enterFastArea
function_map.role: Handle fast-area enter by forwarding to SORCERER::258C with context and caller pid

function_map.name: U8P_CARDAS::leaveFastArea
function_map.role: Handle fast-area leave by forwarding to SORCERER::25D2 with context and caller pid

function_map.name: U8P_CARDAS::cast
function_map.role: Forward spell-cast event (forwards spell id and context) to SPELCMBT::084D for resolution

function_map.name: SORCERER::039C
function_map.role: External SORCERER handler invoked for 'U8P_CARDAS::look' — provides Cardas-specific description/dialog

function_map.name: SORCERER::05EC
function_map.role: External SORCERER handler invoked for 'use' interactions

function_map.name: SORCERER::258C
function_map.role: External SORCERER handler for fast-area enter (proximity enter)

function_map.name: SORCERER::25D2
function_map.role: External SORCERER handler for fast-area leave (proximity exit)

function_map.name: SPELCMBT::084D
function_map.role: External spell-combat resolver used by CARDAS::cast to evaluate spell effects

external_calls.purpose: Perform Cardas-specific U8P_CARDAS::look/description behavior (dialog, text, or contextual reactions). Called with (context, "Cardas", caller pid).
Perform Cardas-specific use/interaction behavior. Called with (context, "Cardas", caller pid).
Handle actor entering Cardas's proximity (fast-area enter) to trigger proximity-based behavior in SORCERER.
Handle actor leaving Cardas's proximity (fast-area leave) to trigger exit behavior in SORCERER.
Resolve a spell cast against Cardas by forwarding the spell id, context and caller pid to the spell-combat subsystem.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This script implements event handlers for the Cardas NPC that act as thin adapters: they prepare event context and forward the actual behavior to shared system routines (SORCERER class handlers for dialog/proximity and SPELCMBT for spell resolution).
